LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT. GRANTED. AFTER REVIEWING THE ADDITIONAL MATERIALS SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL ON AUGUST 31, 2012, THE FEES SOUGHT ARE ADEQUATELY SUPPORTED AND THE SETTLEMENT IS IN FULL COMPLIANCE WITH PROPOSITION 65. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PURSUANT TO TERMS OF POPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-11-2013 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consetn Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: john voorhees, esq., the chanler group, 510.848.8880, for plaintiff john moore; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment. Granted. After reviewing the additional materials submitted by plaintiff's counsel on August 31, 2012, the fees sought are adequately supported and the settlement is in full compliance with Proposition 65. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Set For Trial On Jan-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2012 Continued To Apr-13-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
